payload.title: bug: ai-pr-review.yml returns 'No diff to review' / 'Skip: empty AI response' on every PR
payload.body:
## Bug Report

### Description
The AI PR review workflow () consistently returns empty or skipped review comments. It posts either "No diff to review" or "Skip: empty AI response" on every PR.

### Evidence from PR #4
https://github.com/getwinharris/auraedu/pull/4

Multiple comments from `github-actions[bot]`:
> 🤖 AI Code Review
> No diff to review.

And also:
> Skip: empty AI response

### Root causes

**1. Diff collection fails ("No diff to review")**  
The workflow does `git diff origin/${{ github.base_ref }}...HEAD` but only fetches with `--depth=1`. The base branch commit isn't available for comparison, so the diff is empty.

**2. No AI endpoint configured ("Skip: empty AI response")**  
The inline PHP script checks for `AGENT_ENDPOINT` + `BAPX_AI_API_KEY` secrets, then falls back to `APP_URL`. None are set in the repository's GitHub Secrets, so it always falls through to "Skip".

### Steps to reproduce
1. Open any PR against `main`
2. Wait for the `ai-pr-review` workflow to complete
3. Observe the "No diff to review" or "Skip: empty AI response" comment

### Required fixes
1. Set up GitHub Secrets: `AGENT_ENDPOINT`, `BAPX_AI_API_KEY`, `BAPX_AI_MODEL` in the repository settings
2. Or set `APP_URL` to point to the production server so the workflow can call `/api/chat/completions`
3. Fix diff collection: use `git fetch origin ${{ github.base_ref }} --depth=1` before diffing

### Workflow file
`.github/workflows/ai-pr-review.yml`
